DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DANIEL BACON'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DENIED A MOOT IN THAT DEFENDANT, WHO IS IN PRO PER, RESPONDED TO THEM PRIOR TO THE DATE OF THE HEARING ON THIS MOTION. IF THE PLAINTIFF IS DISSATISFIED WITH THE RESPONSES, A MOTION TO COMPEL DIRECTED TO THE INDIVIDUAL RESPONSES MUST BE FILED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Answer Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Continued To Nov-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Daniel Bacon telephone number 415-864-0907 in Propria Persona.
Defendant Salma Khan telephone number 415-742-7444 in Propria Persona.

The Defendant did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. PLAINTIFF DANIEL BACON'S Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Answer Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanction is continued to November 13, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 (to be heard in the Law & Motion Department).

Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Answer Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - DANIEL RAY BACON, TEL. NO. 1-415-864-0907 APPEARING IN PRO PER;
SALMA KHAN, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. Plaintiff Daniel Bacon's motion to compel plaintiff to respond to form interrogatories is denied a moot in that defendant, who is in pro per, responded to them prior to the date of the hearing on this motion. If the plaintiff is dissatisfied with the responses, a motion to compel directed to the individual responses must be filed. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $250.00. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
